SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model

Class Movie

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
public class Movie extends Object
Represents a single movie screening entry in the Ketchup application. Each instance corresponds to one showtime of a movie, tracking which seats have already been booked and the price per seat. The shared DateTimeFormatter is used consistently across all layers of the application for parsing and formatting showtime values.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Movie

      public Movie(String movieId, String title, String genre, int duration, String rating, String showTime, String occupiedSeat, int seatPrice)
      Constructs a new Movie from raw string data, as typically read from a CSV row. The showTime string is parsed using DATETIME_FORMAT, and occupiedSeat is split on commas into a HashSet. An empty or blank occupiedSeat string results in an empty seat set.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the unique UUID string identifying this screening
      title - the title of the movie
      genre - the genre of the movie
      duration - the runtime of the movie in minutes
      rating - the age rating of the movie
      showTime - the showtime string in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format
      occupiedSeat - a comma-separated string of already-booked seat IDs, or an empty/blank string if no seats are booked
      seatPrice - the price in dollars per seat for this screening

  • Method Details

    • getMovieId

      public String getMovieId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this movie screening.
      Returns:
      the movie ID as a UUID string

    • getDuration

      public int getDuration()
      Returns the runtime of this movie in minutes.
      Returns:
      the duration in minutes

    • getOccupiedSeat

      public HashSet<String> getOccupiedSeat()
      Returns the set of seat IDs that have already been booked for this screening. The returned set is live; callers may add seat IDs directly to it.
      Returns:
      a HashSet of occupied seat ID strings

    • getSeatPrice

      public int getSeatPrice()
      Returns the price per seat for this screening.
      Returns:
      the seat price in dollars

    • getGenre

      public String getGenre()
      Returns the genre of this movie.
      Returns:
      the genre string (e.g. "Sci-Fi")

    • getRating

      public String getRating()
      Returns the age rating of this movie.
      Returns:
      the rating string (e.g. "PG-13")

    • getShowTime

      public LocalDateTime getShowTime()
      Returns the scheduled showtime of this screening.
      Returns:
      the showtime as a LocalDateTime

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the title of this movie.
      Returns:
      the movie title string

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this Movie object, listing all field values. Intended for debugging purposes.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted string containing all movie fields

    • getDatetimeFormat

      public static DateTimeFormatter getDatetimeFormat()
      Returns the shared DateTimeFormatter used throughout the application for parsing and formatting showtime values in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format.
      Returns:
      the application-wide datetime formatter
